docker cp almond.conf almond_keycloak:/etc/almond/almond.conf
docker cp keycloak_pubkey.pem almond_keycloak:/opt/almond/keycloak_pubkey.pem
docker exec almond_keycloak chown almond:almond /etc/almond/almond.conf
docker exec almond_keycloak chown almond:almond /opt/almond/keycloak_pubkey.pem
docker exec almond_keycloak supervisorctl restart almond

curl -X POST "http://localhost:8089/realms/almondmonitor/protocol/openid-connect/token" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
  -d "grant_type=password" \
  -d "client_id=almond-api" \
  -d "username=testuser" \
  -d "password=testuser"
